The Pearce X6 
Packed with best-in-class weaponry, generous onboard storage and a default brig configuration makes this combat and capture vessel a no-brainer for the security minded starfarer 

Now available on the Galactic Marketplace → https://play.staratlas.com/market/5iYpFwUxYj4wgBTZsz6RpCaVFCSy7NfPa3LmSUDKQpqs
